		FinalDecision: entry.FinalDecision,
	}
}

func toTryReviewACs(items []ReviewAC) []agenttry.ReviewAC {
	if len(items) == 0 {
		return nil
	}
	out := make([]agenttry.ReviewAC, 0, len(items))
	for _, item := range items {
		out = append(out, agenttry.ReviewAC{
			Number:   item.Number,
			Item:     item.Item,
			Grade:    item.Grade,
			Evidence: item.Evidence,
		})
	}
	return out
}
